name: Chicken Withe Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 large red and/or yellow peppers, cut into strips
8 skinned, boned chicken thighs, visible fat removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large, heavy nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add peppers and onions to the skillet and sauté until soft and onions are slightly browned, about 20 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in garlic, salt, pepper, vinegar, and sugar. Transfer mixture to a bowl.
3. Wipe pan clean with a paper towel.
4. Season chicken with remaining salt and pepper.
5. Heat remaining olive oil and butter in the skillet until bubbly.
6. Add chicken thighs and cook, turning occasionally, until opaque in the center and brown on both sides, about 20 minutes. Remove from pan and pour off fat.
7. Return chicken and bell pepper mixture to the skillet and cook, stirring, until hot, about 3 minutes.
